modification_notice: Extracted only complete Simplified Chinese prose sentences from the checksum-pinned FTC-authored PDF, joined PDF layout wraps, removed headings, page furniture, navigation URLs, phone instructions, and incomplete fragments, and added input-only provenance; no images, seals, expected text, or converter output were used.
known_biases: The booklet is an official U.S.-focused consumer-protection translation and is not representative of ordinary Taiwan traffic.
Fraud, financial, legal, and cybersecurity language is intentionally concentrated and requires high-stakes/formal domain review.
Pronoun-dependent or context-poor sentences may be excluded during input-only quality review.
Only PDF text authored by the FTC is extracted; graphics, seals, and linked or third-party materials are excluded.
A maximum of 10% of the final candidate pool may come from this source.
